insight: Automaid has potential anti-synergy with Lancetooth (Tooth): Lancetooth's 2 attack can kill Automaid units (Maidens), but the presence of Automaid in the set means the Automaid player can afford to buy Lancetooth while the opponent cannot, partially compensating for this.
author: masn6811
context: Brief exchange about Automaid and Lancetooth interaction during power-level discussion.
